content: Self-Refine’s iterative self-feedback framework can be reconfigured to ground the abstract multi-perspective reasoning of LLM self-reflection mechanisms, creating a hybrid system that uses structured incremental refinement to resolve the perspective inconsistencies that self-reflection identifies. This hybrid approach retains Self-Refine’s key advantage of requiring no extra training or labeled data, while fixing the common flaw of unstructured LLM self-reflection that leads to inconsistent, contradictory outputs.
